participant_id.Description: Anonymised participant identifier. Sub-05 to sub-24 corresponds to the 20 participants retained after excluding 5 of the initially recruited 25 who did not reach stable N2/N3 sleep.

age.Description: Age at the time of the nap session, in years.

order_table_id.Description: Identifier of the counterbalanced condition-order table used during recording. Matches the file recordingScripts/conditions/conditions_<NNN>.csv (and conditionsTI/conditions_<NNN>.csv) in the analysis repository.
